name: ochd expander
description: 4HP expander for ochd. Adds CV control over ochd's master rate and provides inverted outputs for all 8 LFO channels, doubling available modulation waveforms.

inputs.name: Speed CV
inputs.description: CV input for controlling ochd's master rate. Positive CV increases speed; negative CV slows or stalls LFOs.

outputs.name: Inv LFO 1–8
outputs.description: Eight inverted triangle LFO outputs, one per ochd channel. Each is the phase-opposite of the corresponding ochd output.

behaviors.name: Rate CV Control
behaviors.description: The Speed CV input directly modulates ochd's master Rate, enabling voltage-controlled tempo. Works in addition to ochd's Rate knob and its own attenuverter.

behaviors.name: Inverted LFO Outputs
behaviors.description: All 8 inverted outputs are always active and track the ochd LFOs in real-time. When ochd LFO rises, the corresponding inverted output falls.

behaviors.name: Phase Diversity
behaviors.description: Combining an ochd output with its corresponding inverted output creates bipolar modulation pairs. Running both to different destinations doubles modulation complexity.

patchIdeas.name: Push-pull modulation
patchIdeas.patch: LFO 3 out → VCF cutoff · Inv LFO 3 → VCA CV · filter opens as VCA closes

patchIdeas.name: Voltage-controlled LFO speed
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer CV → Speed CV · LFO rate follows sequence for rhythmically evolving modulation

patchIdeas.name: Double the modulation sources
patchIdeas.patch: Use all 8 ochd outs + all 8 inverted outs for 16 distinct triangle waves from a single 4+4HP pair
